memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Thomas Merrick & Elizabeth Tilley Page 120
memoryArtifacts.description: Page 120 Some Discrepancy's in birth dates and some children are listed with mother Elizabeth when perhaps they are the children on Thomas' first marriage?

memoryArtifacts.headline:
Elizabeth Tilley Merrick
(1632 – 21 August 1684)
memoryArtifacts.description: Elizabeth was the daughter of John Tilley and Edith unk. Tilley. She was the second wife of Thomas Merrick. His first wife was Sarah Stebbins whom he married July 14 or Sept. 14, 1639 in Springfield, …

popularStory.headline:
Elizabeth Tilley Merrick
(1632 – 21 August 1684)
popularStory.description: Elizabeth was the daughter of John Tilley and Edith unk. Tilley. She was the second wife of Thomas Merrick. His first wife was Sarah Stebbins whom he married July 14 or Sept. 14, 1639 in Springfield, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tilley於1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，她的父親William Tilley25歲，母親Alice Frost38歲。她於1653年8月21日與Thomas Merrick在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年8月21日在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tilley于1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，她的父亲William Tilley25岁，母亲Alice Frost38岁。她于1653年8月21日与Thomas Merrick在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年8月21日在她的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tilley was born in 1632, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Tilley, was 25 and her mother, Alice Frost, was 38. She married Thomas Merrick on 21 August 1653, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 21 August 1684, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tilley est née en 1632, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Tilley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Frost, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Merrick le 21 août 1653, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1684, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tilley 1632 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Tilley 25 und ihre Mutter Alice Frost 38. Sie hat am 21. August 1653 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Thomas Merrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1684 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tilley è nata il nel 1632 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Tilley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice Frost, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Merrick il 21 agosto 1653, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 agosto 1684, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilleyが1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父William Tilleyは25歳，母Alice Frostは38歳であった。1653年8月21日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでThomas Merrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年8月21日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilley(이)가 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Tilley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Frost(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1653년 8월 21일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Thomas Merrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 8월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tilley nasceu em 1632, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Tilley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Frost, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Merrick em 21 de agosto de 1653, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1684, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tilley родилась в 1632 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Tilley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Frost, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Merrick 21 августа 1653 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 августа 1684 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tilley nació en 1632, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Tilley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Frost, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Merrick el 21 de agosto de 1653, en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1684, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
